title: Insurance Agent Portfolio Website - Frontend Implementation

requirements.summary: Implement hero section with headline, subheadline, emotional trigger, dual CTAs, portrait, and animated gradient lines on dark luxury background
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays H1, subheadline, and emotional trigger line exactly as specified
Two distinct CTA buttons with specified text are visible and clickable
Professional photo placeholder is present
Animated gradient lines are visible with gold or blue colors
Dark luxury background is applied

file_operations.description: Create hero section component with H1 'Protect What Matters Most. Build Wealth That Lasts.', subheadline 'Helping professionals and families secure their financial future with intelligent insurance and long-term protection strategies.', emotional trigger 'One unexpected moment should never destroy a lifetime of hard work.', two CTA buttons ('Book Free Consultation' primary, 'Get Custom Protection Plan' secondary), and professional agent portrait. Reference generated background image at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png and portrait at frontend/public/assets/generated/agent-portrait.dim_400x400.png. Apply animated gold/blue gradient lines with CSS animations on dark background.

requirements.summary: Create trust/authority bar with credentials, stats, and certification badges
acceptanceCriteria: Authority bar displays all five trust elements
Stats are prominently visible
Certification badge placeholders are present

file_operations.description: Create trust bar component displaying 'Licensed & Certified Insurance Advisor', '500+ Families Protected', '98% Claim Support Success', '5-Star Client Satisfaction', and industry certification badge placeholders. Use horizontal layout with icons and stats.

requirements.summary: Build About section with emotional storytelling covering mission-driven mindset and key message
acceptanceCriteria: About section includes specified headline
Emotional storytelling content covers all four themes
Key message is prominently displayed

file_operations.description: Create About section with headline 'Why I Chose to Protect Lives — Not Just Sell Policies' and emotional storytelling covering financial vulnerability realization, mission-driven mindset, family protection focus, and transparency. Display key message 'I don't sell policies. I design financial safety systems.' prominently.

requirements.summary: Create Services section with five premium animated service cards featuring icons, descriptions, and CTAs
acceptanceCriteria: Five service cards are displayed
Each card has title, description, emotional value, icon, and CTA button
Hover effects are applied to cards
Layout is clean and organized

file_operations.description: Create Services section with five service cards (Life Insurance, Health Insurance, Term Plans, Investment Plans, Retirement Planning). Each card includes benefit-driven description, emotional value statement, mini-CTA button, and hover effects. Reference generated service icons at frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-life.dim_64x64.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-health.dim_64x64.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-term.dim_64x64.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-investment.dim_64x64.png, and frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-retirement.dim_64x64.png. Apply glassmorphism card styling.

requirements.summary: Build Why Choose Me section with headline and seven differentiation bullet points
acceptanceCriteria: Section displays specified headline
All seven bullet points are listed
Content is visually organized

file_operations.description: Create Why Choose Me section with headline 'Not Just an Agent. Your Long-Term Financial Partner.' and seven bullet points: Personalized protection strategy, Fast claim support, 100% transparency, No hidden surprises, Annual financial review, 24/7 availability, Long-term advisory relationship. Use icon list layout.

requirements.summary: Create Testimonials section with 3-5 emotional client testimonials featuring ratings and before/after contrast
acceptanceCriteria: 3-5 testimonial cards are displayed
Each testimonial shows 5-star rating
Testimonials include emotional storytelling with before/after contrast
Cards have clean, consistent layout

file_operations.description: Create Testimonials section with 3-5 testimonial cards, each featuring 5-star ratings, real-life impact storytelling with before/after emotional contrast, and clean card layout with glassmorphism styling.

requirements.summary: Implement Emotional Close section with urgency messaging, CTA, and spotlight visual effect
acceptanceCriteria: Section displays all specified copy elements
CTA button is prominently visible
Visual contrast and spotlight effect are applied
Scarcity messaging is clear

file_operations.description: Create Emotional Close section with headline 'Your Family Deserves Security. Don't Wait.', scarcity line 'Every day without protection increases financial risk.', CTA 'Book Your Free Financial Protection Session Now', subtext 'Limited consultation slots available weekly.', and strong visual contrast with spotlight effect using CSS.

requirements.summary: Build Contact section with premium form, WhatsApp button, sticky CTA, and calendar booking placeholder
acceptanceCriteria: Contact form displays all four fields
WhatsApp button is visible and functional
Sticky floating CTA appears on scroll
Form submission captures lead data
Calendar booking placeholder is present

file_operations.description: Create Contact section with premium form containing Name, Phone, Email, and Message fields. Include WhatsApp quick connect button, sticky floating CTA button, and calendar booking integration placeholder. Wire form submission to backend submitContactForm method from backend interface.

requirements.summary: Implement dark luxury theme with navy/black background, gold and electric blue accents, and bright CTA colors
acceptanceCriteria: Background uses deep navy or black
Gold (#D4AF37) is applied as accent color
Electric blue (#2563EB) is applied as secondary accent
CTA buttons use bright gold or vibrant yellow

file_operations.description: Extend Tailwind theme with dark luxury colors: deep navy/black background, gold accent (#D4AF37), electric blue accent (#2563EB), and bright gold/vibrant yellow for CTAs. Add custom color variables for luxury-dark, accent-gold, accent-blue, and cta-bright.
Apply dark luxury theme with deep navy or black body background, and set default text color to light/white for contrast against dark background.

requirements.summary: Apply typography system using Montserrat for headings and Poppins for body text
acceptanceCriteria: All headings use Montserrat font
All body text uses Poppins font
Fonts load correctly

file_operations.description: Import Montserrat and Poppins fonts from Google Fonts. Apply Montserrat to all heading elements (h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6) and Poppins to body text.
Extend Tailwind fontFamily configuration with 'heading': Montserrat and 'body': Poppins font families.

requirements.summary: Implement glassmorphism card styling with smooth animations including parallax, micro-interactions, and glowing hover effects
acceptanceCriteria: Cards use glassmorphism styling (transparency, blur)
Parallax effects are visible on scroll
Buttons have micro-interactions
Hover effects include soft glowing appearance
Animations are smooth and performant

file_operations.description: Add glassmorphism utility classes with backdrop-blur, transparency, and border styles. Define CSS keyframes for parallax effects, button micro-interactions, and soft glowing hover effects. Ensure all animations use CSS only for performance.

requirements.summary: Implement sticky header with smooth scroll navigation
acceptanceCriteria: Header remains visible on scroll
Navigation links trigger smooth scroll to sections

file_operations.description: Create sticky header component with navigation links to all major sections (Hero, About, Services, Why Choose, Testimonials, Contact). Apply position: sticky CSS. Implement smooth scroll behavior using CSS scroll-behavior: smooth or JavaScript scrollIntoView.
Import and render Header component at the top of the application to enable navigation across all sections.

requirements.summary: Add floating WhatsApp icon that remains visible while scrolling
acceptanceCriteria: WhatsApp icon floats on the page
Icon remains visible during scroll
Icon links to WhatsApp contact

file_operations.description: Create floating WhatsApp icon component with fixed positioning (bottom-right corner). Add WhatsApp link with href='https://wa.me/...' pattern. Apply z-index to ensure visibility over other content.
Import and render FloatingWhatsApp component to make it globally visible across the application.

requirements.summary: Ensure mobile-first responsive design that works seamlessly on all device sizes
acceptanceCriteria: Layout adapts to mobile, tablet, and desktop screens
All interactive elements are touch-friendly on mobile
Content remains readable on small screens

file_operations.description: Apply responsive Tailwind classes for mobile-first layout. Adjust hero section layout, CTA button sizing, and text hierarchy for mobile, tablet, and desktop breakpoints.
Apply responsive grid layout for service cards: single column on mobile, 2 columns on tablet, 3 columns on desktop. Ensure touch-friendly spacing.
Apply responsive layout for testimonial cards with single column on mobile and multi-column on larger screens.
Apply responsive form layout with stacked fields on mobile and optimized touch targets for input fields and buttons.

requirements.summary: Apply SEO optimization including semantic HTML5 structure with proper H1/H2/H3 hierarchy
acceptanceCriteria: HTML uses semantic tags (header, main, section, article, footer)
Single H1 per page
H2 and H3 tags follow logical hierarchy
Content structure supports SEO best practices

file_operations.description: Ensure hero section uses single H1 tag for main headline. Wrap content in semantic <section> element.
Use H2 for section headline and semantic <section> wrapper. Apply proper heading hierarchy for subsections.
Use H2 for section title, H3 for individual service card titles. Wrap in semantic <section> element.
Use H2 for section headline and semantic <section> wrapper with <ul> for bullet list.
Use H2 for section title and semantic <section> wrapper with <article> elements for individual testimonials.
Use H2 for contact section title and semantic <section> wrapper with proper <form> element structure.
Wrap all section components in semantic <main> element to establish proper HTML5 document structure.

requirements.summary: Render generated hero background, agent portrait, and service icons as static assets
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images are placed in frontend/public/assets/generated directory
Hero section uses generated background image
Professional portrait is displayed in hero
Service icons are rendered in service cards

file_operations.description: Reference generated background image at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png for hero background and frontend/public/assets/generated/agent-portrait.dim_400x400.png for professional portrait. Use as background-image CSS or img src attributes.

Reference generated service icons: frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-life.dim_64x64.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-health.dim_64x64.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-term.dim_64x64.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-investment.dim_64x64.png, and frontend/public/assets/generated/icon-retirement.dim_64x64.png. Use as img src in respective service cards.
